Superior Belly of Omohyoid m.
Origin: Superior border of scapula near suprascapular notch
Insertion: Body of hyoid bone

details: Origin: Superior border of scapula near suprascapular notch

title: Anterior View of Neck
subtitle: *The origin of the superior belly specifically is the intermediate tendon of omohyoid m.
